symptoms: - // a possible race condition when creating watches from outside the read
failure_signature: - // a possible race condition when creating watches from outside the read
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: remove hbase store.

evidence: evidence: - // a possible race condition when creating watches from outside the read
